training_status: lifting 4x per week, 4-5 cardio sessions per week (30-45 min each)

benefits.description: Started at 365 lbs, current 285 lbs over approximately 1 year. Body fat percentage decreased despite weight plateau in last 10 weeks.

protocol_notes: 1800-2200 calories daily, 200-220g protein daily. Started tirzepatide at unknown dose, increased to 15mg. Weight loss stalled for 10 weeks at current dose. Considering switching to retatrutide and/or adding cagrisema.
